name: Jeanne
bio:
Former Mortal Female Warrior who sacrificed heroically to resist invasion. She was given a new life by the Spirit Heroes Faction, becoming the Flame Saintess and continuing to protect justice with the Seraph Spear.

Role: Group Damage Reduction
Specialty: A frontline Defense-type hero that can increase Physical Damage Reduction and Magical Damage Reduction for all allies; its Ultimate can share damage to protect allies.

skillSlots.name: Divine Aura Blessing
skillSlots.description: Applies [Divine Light Blessing] to self: When taking DMG, heals self and lowest HP percentage ally for 10% of Jeanne's Max HP (max 3 triggers per turn; lasts 2 turns; cannot be dispelled).

skillSlots.name: Radiant Barrier
skillSlots.description: Holy Light shines upon all. Activates [Radiant Barrier] to evenly distribute ATK DMG among All Heroes (Negative Status and Reflection DMG excluded) for 2 turns.

effects.name: Leader's Aura
effects.description: Final DMG RED +10%; during [Radiant Barrier], increases all allies' Effect Resist Rate by 10%.

effects.name: Leader's Aura
effects.description: Jeanne gains 20% Final DMG RED while [Divine Light Blessing] is active.

effects.name: Leader's Aura
effects.description: Dispels 2 Debuffs from self when activating [Radiant Barrier].

effects.name: Leader's Aura
effects.description: During [Radiant Barrier], heals all allies for 5% of Jeanne's Max HP at turn end.

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: Applies 1 stack of [Punitive] when healing allies: Active Attacks deal extra True DMG equal to 10%*[Punitive] stacks of ATK (consumes 1 stack per attack; max 10 stacks; cannot be dispelled).

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: [Divine Light Blessing] applies 2 stacks of [Punitive] to highest-ATK Ally: Active Attacks deal extra True DMG equal to 10%*[Punitive] stacks of ATK (consumes 1 stack per attack; max 10 stacks; cannot be dispelled).

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: [Radiant Barrier] can be activated on turn 1 and increases Jeanne's Crit Resistance by 20% for 3 turns.

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: Heals all allies for 20% of Jeanne's Max HP when activating [Radiant Barrier].

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: [Radiant Barrier] duration +1 turn; Cooldown reduced to 3 turns.
